message:
fix(core): align Star-expansion destructure with 3-tuple col_map format

Commit 5f7771d refactored col_map entries from 2-tuples (table, column)
to 3-tuples (table, column, source_index) to support ambiguous column
detection. The Star-expansion branch in `resolve_result_columns` was
missed in that refactor: its `.map(|(tbl, c)| ...)` closure still
destructured two fields, causing a compile error against the new
col_map shape.

Update the closure pattern to `(tbl, c, _)` so the unused third
element is correctly ignored, restoring Star-expansion for SELECT *
queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
